mapper.select: select m.permission from sys_menu m where m.category = 2
select m.permission from sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm on ur.role_id = rm.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_menu m on rm.menu_id = m.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.category = 2
SELECT u.* FROM sys_user u JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id WHERE u.data_status = 1 AND ur.role_id = 1 or ur.role_id = 11

select GROUP_CONCAT(real_name) from sys_user where id in
#{arr}
